brand.name: Şimşek Mobilya & Mimarlık
brand.tagline: Custom-crafted furniture. Your home, from our atelier.
brand.description: Custom furniture for over 28 years. Our architectural team renovates homes with editorial restraint and material honesty.

home.heroLine2: For 28 years, one grammar: material honesty, editorial restraint, precise craft.
home.manifestoTitle: A space gains its strength more from what you remove than from what you add.
home.manifestoBody1: Across three generations, with three generations of clients, we keep refining one shared grammar: listen to what is, never disguise the material, say more with less.
home.manifestoBody2: Every piece is built in our atelier by master hands. Design, build, and install live under one roof.
home.ctaTitle: Let's start a conversation about your home.
home.ctaBody: The first survey visit is on us. Send a note — we'll call you within 24 hours.
home.instagramBody: We share build progress, finished projects, and atelier diary on Instagram.

portfolio.title: Our Work
portfolio.subtitle: Living, kitchen, bedroom, office. Every piece carries the atelier's signature.
portfolio.noResults: No work in this category yet.

services.title: Services
services.subtitle: A single room, a kitchen, or an entire home. Either way the process runs through one team.
services.ctaBody: Not sure which service fits? Drop us a note — we'll figure it out together.

about.title: About
about.subtitle: Since 1997 we've been building custom furniture and architectural projects from our İstanbul atelier.
about.ctaBody: Our atelier is in İstanbul. Visit by appointment — see the build floor in action.

contact.title: Contact
contact.subtitle: First survey visit is on us. Reach out — we'll respond within 24 hours.

form.title: Project enquiry
form.subtitle: Fill out the short form below and we'll call you within 24 hours.
form.messagePlaceholder: Square meters, the atmosphere you want, timeline — anything on your mind...
form.successBody: Your message has reached us. We'll call within 24 hours.
form.errorBody: Couldn't send the message. Please try again shortly or call us directly.

validation.messageMin: Please add a bit more detail (10 characters min)

footer.tagline: Custom furniture and architectural design since 1997.
